title: Kerala High Court urges Railways to use biodegradable packaging to curb plastic waste
description: The Kerala High Court on Friday expressed concern over the dumping of plastic waste along railway tracks, especially on routes towards the northern parts of the State [Suo Motu v State of Kerala]A Division Bench of Justice Bechu Kurian Thomas and Justice P Gopinath was hearing a suo motu case initiated by the High Court to address the issue of waste management,The Court suggested that the Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) should mandate use of biodegradable p
